title: Business Development Manager
description:
Our client, a global healthcare solutions provider supporting pharmaceutical products and market access across multiple regions, is seeking a Business Development Manager to support its growing operations in Southeast Asia.

This role will lead and optimize distributor and channel partner network in Singapore and subsequently, across Southeast Asia. In addition, the incumbent will also focus on driving distributor performance, expanding market coverage, and strengthening execution across hospital, retail, clinic, and public sector pharmaceutical channels.

Responsibilities:     

  • Develop and execute distribution and channel strategies in Singapore and the SEA countries.    
  • Appoint, manage, and performance-manage distributors across multiple markets
  • Drive multi-channel sales execution across hospitals, pharmacies, clinics, doctors and distributors.
  • Lead commercial negotiations and distributor agreements
  • Drive sales execution, forecasting, and inventory performance
  • Support tenders and institutional channel execution
  • Partner cross-functionally with Sales, Marketing, Regulatory, and Supply Chain teams

Requirements:  

  • 5–8 years’ experience in pharmaceutical commercial roles
  • Strong distributor and channel management experience in Singapore and several SEA countries.
  • Proven experience managing both direct and distributor channels including hospitals, retail pharmacies, and physician/clinic networks
  • Experience in branded generics and multi-channel environments
  • Strong commercial, negotiation, and stakeholder management skills
  • Willingness to travel regionally

This is an excellent opportunity to take ownership of a high-impact regional role in a growing pharmaceutical organization.

postedCompany.description:
PDR Group
A Global Provider of Integrated Talent Solutions

PDR Group is a global provider of integrated talent solutions, trusted by over 10,000 organizations.
We are committed to shaping the future of talent by connecting individuals from all backgrounds with meaningful opportunities. In doing so, we foster a sustainable talent ecosystem where both talent and businesses can grow and thrive together.

Since 2006, PDR has leveraged nearly two decades of deep industry expertise to build a strong presence across 300+ cities in China and Southeast Asia. Through our “One Contract, Global Delivery” model, we’ve enabled over 6 million individuals to access career opportunities across 20+ industries, including electric vehicles, automotive, consumer electronics, hospitality, manufacturing, healthcare & pharmaceuticals, e-commerce, logistics & supply chain, banking & finance, and contact centers.

Our six core service lines—global executive search, outsourcing, recruitment, staffing, early career programs, and HR consulting—form a scalable, cross-industry platform for delivering tailored, future-ready talent solutions.

We put clients first, combining strategic insight with executional excellence to deliver results at scale. Our industry-leading capabilities and cross-regional network have earned us top recognition and the continued trust of leading organizations, including Fortune 500 companies, across regions.
postedCompany.name: PDR GROUP (SEA) PTE. LTD.
